entries.summary: Phase 2 added the API foundation (SSE streaming, batch upload, settings CRUD) and browser ML feasibility spike. Key challenges: SSE thread-to-async bridging required asyncio.Queue, auth dependency override target was wrong (authenticate not require_auth), and TypeScript type-only imports caused runtime crashes.

metadata.plan_id: HTML5 Web Version — Browser-Side Inference + API Hybrid Architecture

lessons_learned: TypeScript 'import type' erases at runtime — never use it for classes you instantiate (ApiError, SSEStreamConsumer)
FastAPI Security(require_auth()) resolves the inner function at module load time — override the inner function (authenticate), not the factory (require_auth)
SSE streaming across thread boundaries requires asyncio.Queue + call_soon_threadsafe — never yield from a thread callback directly
Always verify dynamic import error handling actually works — the catch path is the most important path for ML libraries that may not be installed
When mocking file upload endpoints, remember the framework creates temp files — mock based on source_name not path
